name: AWS DevOps Engineer Path
description: Complete roadmap to become an AWS DevOps Engineer covering CI/CD, infrastructure automation, and monitoring.

steps.title: AWS Fundamentals
steps.description: Core AWS services: EC2, S3, VPC, IAM, Lambda, EBS

steps.title: Compute Services
steps.description: EC2 instances, Lambda functions, ECS, EKS, and Fargate

steps.title: Storage & Databases
steps.description: S3, EBS, RDS, DynamoDB for data persistence

steps.title: Networking & Security
steps.description: VPC, ELB, IAM, KMS for secure architectures

steps.title: Infrastructure as Code
steps.description: CloudFormation and Terraform for AWS

steps.title: CI/CD Pipelines
steps.description: CodePipeline, CodeBuild, CodeDeploy

steps.title: Monitoring & Logging
steps.description: CloudWatch, X-Ray, CloudTrail for observability

steps.title: AI/ML Services
steps.description: Amazon Bedrock and SageMaker for AI workloads

name: Azure DevOps Engineer Path
description: Master Azure DevOps services and become proficient in cloud-native development on Microsoft Azure.

steps.title: Azure Fundamentals
steps.description: Core Azure services and portal navigation

steps.title: Compute Services
steps.description: Virtual Machines, Azure Functions, Container Apps

steps.title: Storage & Databases
steps.description: Blob Storage, Azure Files, SQL Database, Cosmos DB

steps.title: Networking & Security
steps.description: Virtual Network, Load Balancer, Entra ID, Key Vault

steps.title: Infrastructure as Code
steps.description: ARM templates, Bicep, and Terraform for Azure

steps.title: Azure DevOps Services
steps.description: Repos, Pipelines, Boards, Artifacts

steps.title: Container Orchestration
steps.description: AKS, Container Apps, and container solutions

steps.title: Monitoring & Governance
steps.description: Azure Monitor, Application Insights, Policy

steps.title: AI Services
steps.description: Azure OpenAI Service and AI Foundry

name: GCP DevOps Engineer Path
description: Learn Google Cloud Platform DevOps practices including GKE, Cloud Build, and SRE principles.

steps.title: GCP Fundamentals
steps.description: Compute Engine, Cloud Storage, VPC, IAM

steps.title: Infrastructure as Code
steps.description: Deployment Manager and Terraform for GCP

steps.title: CI/CD with Cloud Build
steps.description: Cloud Build, Cloud Deploy, Artifact Registry

steps.title: GKE & Containers
steps.description: Google Kubernetes Engine mastery

steps.title: SRE Practices
steps.description: Monitoring, logging, and reliability engineering

name: Terraform Mastery
description: Deep dive into Terraform for multi-cloud infrastructure management and advanced patterns.

steps.title: Terraform Basics
steps.description: HCL syntax, providers, resources, and state

steps.title: State Management
steps.description: Remote state, locking, and workspaces

steps.title: Modules & Reusability
steps.description: Creating and using Terraform modules

steps.title: Advanced Patterns
steps.description: Dynamic blocks, for_each, conditionals

steps.title: CI/CD Integration
steps.description: Terraform in pipelines and GitOps

name: Kubernetes Administrator Path
description: Comprehensive Kubernetes training from basics to CKA certification preparation.

steps.title: Container Fundamentals
steps.description: Docker basics and container concepts

steps.title: Kubernetes Architecture
steps.description: Control plane, nodes, and core components

steps.title: Workloads & Scheduling
steps.description: Deployments, StatefulSets, DaemonSets

steps.title: Networking & Services
steps.description: Services, Ingress, Network Policies

steps.title: Storage & Configuration
steps.description: PV, PVC, ConfigMaps, Secrets

steps.title: Security & Troubleshooting
steps.description: RBAC, security contexts, debugging

name: CI/CD Pipeline Mastery
description: Learn to build robust CI/CD pipelines using various tools and best practices.

steps.title: CI/CD Fundamentals
steps.description: Understanding continuous integration and deployment concepts

steps.title: Jenkins Pipelines
steps.description: Building pipelines with Jenkins and Groovy

steps.title: GitHub Actions
steps.description: Workflow automation with GitHub Actions

steps.title: GitLab CI/CD
steps.description: Building pipelines with GitLab

steps.title: Advanced Patterns
steps.description: Blue-green deployments, canary releases, feature flags
